narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 972 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
